hero.badge: 70+ Assets • Free Trial • Real Historical Data
hero.title: Discover how your investments
hero.subtitle: Simulate investment strategies with real historical data going back 30+ years. See how much you would have gained (or lost) by investing in the past.
hero.description: Sign up for free and start testing your strategies. Get free backtests to experiment and find your perfect portfolio, then upgrade for unlimited access.

features.title: What You Can Do
features.subtitle: Professional-grade tools to make informed investment decisions

list.title: 70+ Assets Across 5 Categories
list.description: Combine ETFs, cryptocurrencies, commodities (gold, silver, copper), bonds, and real estate. Build diversified portfolios like professionals do, choosing from the world's major assets.

list.title: Lump Sum vs DCA
list.description: Compare lump sum investing with Dollar Cost Averaging (DCA). Discover which strategy would have performed better in the historical period you choose.

list.title: Automatic Rebalancing
list.description: Simulate periodic portfolio rebalancing (monthly, quarterly, annually) to keep it aligned with your target allocation percentages at all times.

list.title: Historical Data Up to 30+ Years
list.description: Use real prices with history dating back to 1993 for some assets. Test strategies across past financial crises, bull markets, and high volatility periods to understand real risks.

list.title: Advanced Metrics
list.description: Analyze total return, annual average, max drawdown, volatility, and Sharpe ratio. Discover which asset contributed most and visualize portfolio evolution with interactive charts.

list.title: Save and Compare
list.description: Save your favorite backtests and compare up to 4 different strategies side by side. View metrics, allocations, and performance in a single screen for more informed decisions.

steps.title: Build Your Portfolio
steps.description: Choose from 70+ assets (S&P 500 ETFs, Bitcoin, gold, bonds...) and set allocation percentages. Or use predefined portfolios like 60/40 or All Weather.

steps.title: Configure Your Strategy
steps.description: Select historical period, initial capital, strategy (Lump Sum or DCA), and rebalancing frequency. Then press "Run Backtest" and get results in seconds.

steps.title: Analyze and Compare
steps.description: Study metrics, explore interactive charts, and save interesting simulations. Compare different strategies to find the one that best fits your goals.

cta.title: Ready to test your investment strategy?
cta.subtitle: Sign up in 30 seconds and start creating your first portfolio right away. Free backtests to get started.
